name: output-skills
description: Skills for generating self-contained interactive HTML output and compressed caveman responses, packaged for OpenAI Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Self-contained interactive HTML artifacts and compressed caveman responses.
interface.longDescription: A focused bundle of output-format skills: single-file interactive HTML reports, source-grounded architecture maps, polished data and concept visualizations, plus the caveman compression mode for ultra-terse fact-only responses.
defaultPrompt: Build an interactive architecture map of this repository.
Turn this concept into a polished interactive visualization.
Render this analysis as a single-file HTML report.
Use caveman full for compressed responses.
